title: CodeGrind launches AI-assisted problem solving with updated Code Breach tower defense visuals
summary: Showcase the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk UI and AI assistant capabilities guiding users through practice problems with live code execution and model-assisted help.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant and an updated Code Breach cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic. Real-time code execution, problem-solving guidance, and enhanced visuals help users learn by doing, iterating, and visualizing programming concepts as defensive towers.
cta: Try a practice problem now and ask the AI assistant for hints or explanations as you code.
visual_brief: A short 15-20 second demo video showing the CodeGrind editor with a live problem, the AI assistant panel giving tips, and a quick view of the cyberpunk Code Breach towers transforming as code is written. End with a clean logo and a call-to-action to start solving.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind unveils AI-assisted problem solving with an updated Code Breach cyberpunk UI. Experience live code execution, model-guided hints, and visually responsive towers as you solve practice problems. Watch the 15–20 second demo visual and start solving with the AI assistant today. Learn more at https://codegrind.online

reddit_subreddit.text: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant and a refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk UI.
